title: Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Haryana

overview.short: Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in Panchkula district of Haryana State, India.
overview.description: Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in Panchkula district of Haryana State, India. It is 0.5 kilometres (0.31 mi) away from Panchkula on the Morni Road and its aerial distance from the Bir Shikargah Wildlife Sanctuary is only 3 kilometres (1.9 mi).

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chandi Mandir
topPlaces.description: Chandi Mandir (Hindi, Mandir: "Temple") is a Hindu temple dedicated to Chandi the goddess of power, near Chandigarh, located on NH-5 Chandigarh-Kalka highway in Panchkula city of Haryana state of India. It is about 15 km from the city of Chandigarh, which was named after the temple, and about 10 km away from the Mansa Devi Shrine.

topPlaces.name: Nada Sahib
topPlaces.description: Nada Sahib is a Sikh gurudwara in the Panchkula district of the Indian state of Haryana. Situated on the banks of the Ghaggar-Hakra River in the Sivalik Hills of Panchkula, it is the site where Guru Gobind Singh Ji halted while travelling from Paonta Sahib to Anandpur Sahib after the Battle of Bhangani in 1688.

topPlaces.name: Chandimandir Cantonment
topPlaces.description: Chandimandir Cantonment is a military cantonment of the Indian Army located in Panchkula at the foot of the Sivalik Hills. It is the headquarters of the Western Command of the Indian Army.

topPlaces.name: Jatayu Conservation Breeding Centre, Pinjore
topPlaces.description: The Jatayu and Sparrow Conservation Breeding Centre (JCBC) is the world's largest facility for the breeding and conservation of Indian vultures and the house sparrow (Passer domesticus). It is located within the Bir Shikargah Wildlife Sanctuary in the town of Pinjore in the State of Haryana, India.

topPlaces.name: Tau Devi Lal Athletic Stadium (Panchkula)
topPlaces.description: Tau Devi Lal Stadium is a multi-purpose stadium located in Sector 3, Panchkula, a satellite town in the outskirts of Chandigarh. It is the home ground of the Indian Super League side RoundGlass Punjab FC, together with Guru Nanak Stadium.

topPlaces.name: Tau Devi Lal Cricket Stadium
topPlaces.description: Tau Devi Lal Stadium is a cricket stadium located in Sector 3, Panchkula, a satellite town in the outskirts of Chandigarh. The stadium is capable of holding around 7,000 spectators and came into picture because of the Indian Cricket League's inaugural Twenty20 tournament.

topPlaces.name: Terminal Ballistics Research Laboratory
topPlaces.description: Terminal Ballistics Research Laboratory (TBRL) is a laboratory of the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) which comes under Ministry of Defence. Located in Chandigarh, the laboratory has become one of the major DRDO labs in the field of armament studies.

topPlaces.name: Bir Shikargarh Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Bir Shikargah Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in Panchkula district of Haryana state, India. It is spread over an area of 767.30 hectares (1,896.0 acres).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Chandigarh Railway Station (12 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chandi Mandir, Nada Sahib, Chandimandir Cantonment, Jatayu Conservation Breeding Centre, Pinjore, Tau Devi Lal Athletic Stadium (Panchkula).
